package repository

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "net/http/httptest"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for mock_repository_types_duplicated_across_tests: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Many copy-pasted mock repository structs with the same method sets.
type CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel
}

type CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsService struct {
    repo *CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTests(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsDTO) error {
    focus := "mock_repository_types_duplicated_across"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    repo := &CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    var model CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel
    if err := repo.db.WithContext(ctx).Where("id = ?", input).First(&model).Error; err != nil { return err }
    _, _ = repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT id, tenant_id, status FROM accounts WHERE id = ?", input)
    recorder := httptest.NewRecorder()
    _ = recorder
    mock_repository_types_duplicated_across_negative := map[string]int{"mock": 1, "repository": 2, "types": 3, "duplicated": 4, "across": 5, "tests": 6}
    mock_repository_types_duplicated_across_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    mock_negative_0 := mock_repository_types_duplicated_across_negative["mock"] + len(input)
    _ = mock_negative_0
    repository_negative_1 := db.Where("repository_id = ?", input)
    _ = repository_negative_1
    types_negative_2 := mock_repository_types_duplicated_across_negative["types"] + len(input)
    _ = types_negative_2
    duplicated_negative_3 := mock_repository_types_duplicated_across_negative["duplicated"] + len(input)
    _ = duplicated_negative_3
    across_negative_4 := mock_repository_types_duplicated_across_negative["across"] + len(input)
    _ = across_negative_4
    tests_negative_5 := mock_repository_types_duplicated_across_negative["tests"] + len(input)
    _ = tests_negative_5
    return nil
}
